
--- page 1 ---


Example Protocol Formal Verification
Auditor: Certora
Published: 2024-12-19

Overview

Certora performed a formal verification review of the Example Protocol
core contracts using the Certora Prover.

--- page 2 ---


Smart Contracts in Scope

Contracts verified under this engagement, with line counts:

Pool.sol              420 lines
Vault.sol             310 lines
Strategy.sol          180 lines
Registry.sol           95 lines

Mocks and test fixtures (Mock*.sol, Test*.sol) were excluded.

--- page 3 ---


Rules and Invariants

22 rules passed across Pool, Vault, Strategy, and Registry.
